hero.headline: Alliance University Online MBA in Operations: AI-Integrated Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: Alliance University Online MBA with an Operations specialisation. NAAC A, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #71, AICTE approved, WES recognised. Agile Supply Chain Management, AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Business Blockchain, Strategic Sustainable Operations, and Digital Transformation for Operations in Sem 3-4. Rs 1,75,000 effective total cost with zero-cost EMI through the university.

sections.tldr: Alliance Online MBA Operations: NAAC A, NIRF #71, Rs 1,75,000 effective total cost (tuition + registration + exam fees), zero-cost EMI direct from university. AI-integrated operations curriculum with AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Agile Supply Chain Management, Business Blockchain, and Strategic Sustainable Operations. Design Thinking mandatory in Sem 3. Strong for supply chain, manufacturing excellence, and operations leadership careers.

about.body:
The Alliance University Online MBA in Operations is offered by Alliance University, Bangalore. Alliance holds NAAC A accreditation, NIRF #71 University ranking, AICTE approval, and WES recognition. The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The Operations specialisation delivers AI-integrated operations and supply chain subjects. Sem 3 covers Project Management, Agile Supply Chain Management, Competition in Business Ecosystem, Greener Value Chain in Operation Management, and Digital Transformation for Operations. Sem 4 includes AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Business Blockchain, Strategic Sustainable Operations, and Business Intelligence for Managers.

Alliance builds AI into every MBA specialisation. Operations students get AI Powered Lean Six Sigma as a dedicated Sem 4 subject, combining traditional Six Sigma methodology with AI-driven process optimisation, predictive quality control, and automated root cause analysis. This is a genuine curriculum differentiator: most operations MBA programmes teach standard Lean Six Sigma, while Alliance integrates AI into the methodology. Design Thinking is mandatory in Sem 3, building structured problem-solving skills essential for operations improvement projects.

sem3Subjects.name: Design Thinking
sem3Subjects.description: Apply human-centred design frameworks to business problem identification, prototyping, and iterative solution development. Mandatory for all Alliance MBA specialisations.

sem3Subjects.name: Project Management
sem3Subjects.description: Apply project planning, scheduling, resource allocation, risk management, and agile methodology to manage operations and business transformation projects.

sem3Subjects.name: Agile Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design responsive supply chain networks using agile principles, demand sensing, and flexible inventory strategies for volatile market conditions.

sem3Subjects.name: Competition in Business Ecosystem
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse competitive dynamics in platform economies, ecosystem strategies, and co-opetition models for operations strategy alignment.

sem3Subjects.name: Greener Value Chain in Operation Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design sustainable operations processes, green procurement practices, circular economy models, and carbon footprint reduction strategies across the value chain.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Transformation for Operations
sem3Subjects.description: Evaluate IoT, automation, digital twins, and Industry 4.0 technologies for manufacturing and service operations transformation.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Management in Digital Era
sem4Subjects.description: Develop corporate strategy using digital transformation frameworks, competitive analysis in platform economies, and technology-driven growth planning.

sem4Subjects.name: Dissertation and Viva
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied operations research project with formal viva defence. Topics may cover AI-driven process optimisation, supply chain resilience, or sustainable operations strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: AI Powered Lean Six Sigma
sem4Subjects.description: Apply DMAIC methodology augmented with AI-driven root cause analysis, predictive quality control, and machine learning process optimisation for manufacturing and service operations.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Blockchain
sem4Subjects.description: Evaluate blockchain applications in supply chain traceability, smart contracts for procurement, and distributed ledger solutions for operations transparency.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Sustainable Operations
sem4Subjects.description: Design long-term operations strategies that balance profitability with environmental sustainability, ESG compliance, and circular economy principles.

sem4Subjects.name: Business Intelligence for Managers
sem4Subjects.description: Apply BI dashboards, data visualisation, and operational analytics to support data-driven decision-making in operations management.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all Alliance MBA specialisations. Design Thinking is a mandatory Sem 3 subject for all specs. Strategic Management in Digital Era and Dissertation are common Sem 4 subjects.

whoHires.body:
Operations MBA graduates from Alliance Online target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** Manufacturing, Automotive, E-commerce and logistics, FMCG supply chain, IT services delivery, Pharmaceutical operations

**Entry-level roles:** Operations Executive, Supply Chain Analyst, Quality Analyst, Production Planning Associate, Logistics Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Operations Manager, Supply Chain Manager, Quality Manager, Production Manager, Procurement Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** COO, VP Operations, Head of Supply Chain, Director of Manufacturing, Chief Procurement Officer

**Top hiring sectors:** Toyota, Bosch, Continental, Amazon, Flipkart, Delhivery, HUL, ITC, Infosys BPM, Wipro Infrastructure, Biocon, Dr. Reddy's, Schneider Electric

skills.body:
The Alliance Operations specialisation builds AI-augmented supply chain and manufacturing management skills:

**Technical skills:**
- AI Powered Lean Six Sigma: DMAIC methodology with AI-driven root cause analysis, predictive quality control, and ML-based process optimisation
- Agile Supply Chain Management: demand sensing, flexible inventory strategies, and responsive supply chain network design
- Business Blockchain: supply chain traceability, smart contracts for procurement, and distributed ledger operations
- Digital Transformation for Operations: IoT, automation, digital twins, and Industry 4.0 technology evaluation

**Applied skills:**
- Greener Value Chain in Operation Management: sustainable procurement, circular economy models, and carbon footprint reduction
- Strategic Sustainable Operations: long-term operations strategy balancing profitability with ESG compliance
- Business Intelligence for Managers: BI dashboards, data visualisation, and operational analytics for decision-making

**Soft skills:** Design Thinking for process improvement ideation, Project Management for transformation initiatives, presenting operational efficiency gains to leadership, and cross-functional stakeholder management.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Alliance Online MBA Operations against peers:

**vs SSODL Online MBA Operations (Rs 3,15,000):** Symbiosis carries strong brand recognition and NAAC A++ accreditation. SSODL Operations covers traditional supply chain, quality management, and production planning at Rs 3,15,000. Alliance Operations at Rs 1,75,000 is Rs 1,40,000 cheaper and includes AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Business Blockchain, and Digital Transformation for Operations. For candidates wanting AI-augmented operations skills at significantly lower fees, Alliance is a compelling value option.

**vs Amity Online MBA Operations (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 with strong all-India brand. Amity Operations covers supply chain, quality management, and project management. Alliance Operations at Rs 1,75,000 is Rs 50,000 cheaper and adds AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Business Blockchain, and Greener Value Chain as dedicated subjects. Alliance's AI-integrated and sustainability-focused operations curriculum is a genuine differentiator at lower fees.

fees.body:
The Alliance University Online MBA in Operations is priced at Rs 1,60,000 total tuition fee across 4 semesters (Rs 40,000 per semester).

**Additional charges**:
- Registration fee: Rs 5,000 (one-time, non-refundable at admission)
- Examination fee: Rs 5,000 per year (Rs 10,000 total across 2 years)

**Effective total cost**: Rs 1,75,000 inclusive of tuition, registration, and exam charges.

**Payment options**:
- **Semester-wise**: Rs 40,000 per semester x 4 semesters
- **Full upfront**: Rs 1,60,000 one-time (plus Rs 5K reg + exam)

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Alliance University (no external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary). Contact our counsellor for current tenure options.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Alliance University each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Alliance University, Bangalore, and carries the Alliance name with the MBA designation. The Operations specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from Alliance Online MBA Operations students. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Vikram
items.liked: AI Powered Lean Six Sigma was the highlight. The AI-driven root cause analysis and predictive quality modules were directly applicable to my manufacturing quality role. This is not standard Six Sigma with an AI label.
items.disliked: Case studies could include more Indian manufacturing examples.
items.body: I work in automotive manufacturing near Bangalore and the Alliance Operations MBA gave me AI-augmented quality and supply chain frameworks. The combination of AI Powered Lean Six Sigma with Agile Supply Chain Management is practical and current. Design Thinking in Sem 3 helped me restructure our shop-floor problem-solving process.

items.name: Deepika
items.liked: Greener Value Chain and Strategic Sustainable Operations gave practical ESG and sustainability frameworks. Business Blockchain was a useful addition for supply chain traceability.
items.disliked: Alliance's online MBA is newer. Chennai manufacturing employers are less familiar with Alliance online compared to Symbiosis or Amity.
items.body: Good operations curriculum with genuine AI and sustainability integration at Rs 1.75L. The sustainability subjects are well-designed for companies now facing ESG reporting requirements. For Chennai manufacturing careers, the Alliance brand needs more time to build recognition. Content quality was strong.

items.name: Arjun
items.liked: Digital Transformation for Operations and Project Management were relevant for my IT services delivery role.
items.disliked: NAAC A (not A+) is a gap compared to Symbiosis (A++) or Amity (A+). Smaller specialisation list than competitors. Limited operations-specific placement support.
items.body: Decent programme for the fees. AI Powered Lean Six Sigma is a genuine differentiator that standard operations MBAs do not offer. But for Pune manufacturing and automotive companies, Symbiosis SSODL carries significantly stronger brand weight despite being almost double the cost. Alliance is a value pick if AI skills matter more than brand prestige.

faqs.question: Is Alliance Online MBA really AI-integrated across all courses?
faqs.answer: Yes. Alliance embeds AI-specific subjects into every MBA specialisation, not as electives but as core semester subjects. The Operations spec includes AI Powered Lean Six Sigma as a dedicated Sem 4 subject combining traditional DMAIC with AI-driven root cause analysis and predictive quality control. This is built into the curriculum, not a separate certificate.

faqs.question: What is the total effective cost of Alliance Online MBA Operations?
faqs.answer: Rs 1,75,000. This includes Rs 1,60,000 tuition (Rs 40,000 per semester x 4), Rs 5,000 one-time registration fee, and Rs 10,000 total examination fees (Rs 5,000 per year x 2 years).

faqs.question: Does Alliance offer zero-cost EMI for the Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. Zero-cost EMI is available directly through Alliance University with no external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary. Contact our counsellor for current tenure options and approval terms.

faqs.question: Does Alliance Operations MBA cover sustainability and green supply chain?
faqs.answer: Yes. Two dedicated subjects cover sustainability: Greener Value Chain in Operation Management (Sem 3) covers sustainable procurement, circular economy models, and carbon footprint reduction. Strategic Sustainable Operations (Sem 4) covers long-term strategy balancing profitability with ESG compliance. Both are core subjects, directly relevant for companies facing ESG reporting requirements.

faqs.question: How does AI Powered Lean Six Sigma differ from regular Lean Six Sigma?
faqs.answer: Alliance's AI Powered Lean Six Sigma builds on the standard DMAIC framework but adds AI-driven root cause analysis using machine learning, predictive quality control for defect prevention, and ML-based process optimisation. This goes beyond traditional statistical process control to include AI techniques for pattern detection and predictive maintenance in manufacturing and service operations.

chooseIf: You want an AI-integrated operations MBA with AI Powered Lean Six Sigma, Business Blockchain, and sustainability subjects at Rs 1,75,000 total cost.
You are targeting supply chain, manufacturing excellence, or operations leadership careers in South India manufacturing hubs.
You want sustainability and ESG-focused operations subjects alongside AI integration and Design Thinking.
consider: If brand recognition is the top priority and budget allows, Symbiosis SSODL Operations at Rs 3,15,000 carries the strongest operations MBA brand in India.
If NAAC grade and all-India recognition matter, Amity Operations (NAAC A+) at Rs 2,25,000 is a mid-tier brand and fee option.
If North India manufacturing careers are the goal, consider CU or LPU operations programmes with stronger regional placement networks.
